ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "pretty_formula" TEXT /* Composition of the material in a readable format */,
  "final_energy" REAL /* Final energy of the material */,
  "e_above_hull" REAL /* Energy above the hull of the material */,
  "spacegroup_number" INTEGER /* Space group number of the material */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the material */,
  "full_formula" TEXT /* Full formula of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "band_gap" REAL /* Band gap of the material */,
  "magnetic_type" TEXT /* Magnetic type of the material */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was last modified */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the material data (e.g., experiment, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_spacegroup_number FOREIGN KEY ("spacegroup_number") REFERENCES spacegroups ("spacegroup_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the element */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the element */,
  "atomic_mass" REAL /* Atomic mass of the element */,
  "electronic_configuration" TEXT /* Electronic configuration of the element */,
  "isotopes" TEXT /* List of isotopes of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_elements" (
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the element in the material */,
  "mole_fraction" REAL /* Mole fraction of the element in the material */,
  "weight_fraction" REAL /* Weight fraction of the element in the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id", "element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacegroups" (
  "spacegroup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each space group */,
  "spacegroup_number" INTEGER /* Number of the space group */,
  "spacegroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the space group */,
  "crystal_system" TEXT /* Crystal system of the space group */,
  "point_group" TEXT /* Point group of the space group */,
  "wyckoff_positions" TEXT /* List of Wyckoff positions for the space group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacegroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_spacegroups" (
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material */,
  "spacegroup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the space group's relevance to the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id", "spacegroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icsd_ids" (
  "icsd_id" INTEGER /* ICSD ID of the material */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the ICSD entry */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the ICSD entry was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icsd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icsd_ids_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_icsd_ids" (
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material */,
  "icsd_id" INTEGER /* ICSD ID of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the ICSD entry's relevance to the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id", "icsd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment explaining the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_tags" (
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id", "tag_id")
)
